[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000011001 3
1 0000000000 a
2 0000000000 a
3 0000000000 a
4 0000000000 a
5 0000000010 1
6 0101000110 4
7 0000101000 2

01 10 0000010110 3
12 21 0100110000 3
23 32 0100000000 1
34 43 0100000010 2
45 54 1000000000 1
56 65 0000001000 1
67 76 0000011001 3 match 0
70 07 0000010001 2

02 20 0000010001 2
13 31 0100000010 2
24 42 0100000000 1
35 53 0000000000 a match 1 2 3 4
46 64 0000000000 a match 1 2 3 4
57 75 0000101000 2 match 7
60 06 0000010001 2
71 17 0001110000 3

03 30 0000000010 1 match 5
14 41 0101000110 4 match 6
25 52 0000101000 2 match 7
36 63 0000000000 a match 1 2 3 4
47 74 0001000000 1
50 05 1000000000 1
61 16 0000010000 1
72 27 0000111001 4

04 40 1000000110 3
15 51 0000100000 1
26 62 0000011001 3 match 0
37 73 0000000000 a match 1 2 3 4
